headline: Bear Market Signal Flashing at 67%
detail: A rare market signal is now active with historically high odds of a bear market following. For a margin trader concentrated in high-beta tech and chips, a 20%+ drawdown hits twice as hard. This is the macro backdrop you're trading against right now.

headline: Chip Stocks Rebound, But Diverge From Mag7
detail: Semiconductors are bouncing while Mag7 names lag — a split that headlines warn could signal broader market trouble ahead. SMH is your clean winner here, but if this divergence is a warning sign rather than a rotation, your whole book is exposed. Watch whether SMH's strength is real demand or just a bounce.

headline: Micron Post-Earnings Rally Nearly Gone, Traders Divided
detail: Micron's big move after earnings has almost fully reversed with no consensus on direction. This matters for sentiment across your chip names — AVGO and SMH especially. When the strongest post-earnings mover fades, it signals the sector rally may lack conviction.

headline: Goldman M&A Wins and Chip Rebound
detail: Goldman's M&A activity alongside the chip rebound suggests some institutional appetite remains in the sector. That's a mild positive for AVGO and SMH near-term, but it doesn't change the bigger picture of your flagged positions needing action.
